targets.name: bbb
targets.notes: amd64 Linux docker host; the proven O6/eval venue; authoritative for gate:compose + stress/chaos + the real bot.

targets.name: ci
targets.notes: GitHub Actions; runs the green-or-skip gate suite (docker-compose gates self-skip without a docker runner).

targets.name: throwaway-linode
targets.provision: linode-cli linodes create (akamai-staging token); destroy when done
targets.notes: provisioned on demand for isolated/parallel runs; not standing.

resources.name: prod-cloud
resources.notes: the production Vexa stack that launches + drives the speaking bots for the Lane B (L4) meeting eval.

resources.name: speaker-tokens
resources.notes: one service test-account token per synthetic speaker; N tokens ⇒ an N-speaker meeting.

resources.name: stt
resources.notes: the bot's STT; sourced from the runtime container env on bbb (Lane B).

resources.name: minio
resources.notes: recording master object store; in-stack on compose (Lane A) / configured for Lane B.

resources.name: meeting
resources.notes: a live Google Meet (per-run NATIVE_ID) the bot + speakers join (Lane B).

resources.name: admit
resources.notes: the one human step: admit the bot in the Meet UI (Lane B); the harness waits and smoke-degrades if absent.
